title: lactuca keiskeana
intro: Lactuca keiskeana, also known as Keiske's lettuce or Japanese lettuce, is a species of lettuce native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lactuca keiskeana include reducing oxidative stress, improving digestive health, and exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Lactuca keiskeana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can be consumed raw in salads, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
